buckets.name: 3rd-year students seeking internships
buckets.description: Pre-final-year college students hunting for their first real internship; anxious about resumes and standing out.

buckets.name: Final-year students facing placements
buckets.description: Students in placement season; high urgency, peer comparison pressure, deadline-driven decisions.
pains: fear of graduating without a job

buckets.name: Working professionals switching into AI
buckets.description: 1-8 years experience, watching AI reshape their field; want a credible transition path without quitting their job.

buckets.name: Complete beginners
buckets.description: No coding or AI background; curious but intimidated; need a low-friction, jargon-free entry point.
